◎简　　介  

　　Gunnar Papphammar (played by Gösta Ekman, in my opinion one of the finest actors ever to emerge from Sweden) is a corny middle aged man who always seem to end up in the most strange situations; some by accident, some on expense of his own clumsyness.This was originally a TV series and I am not sure weather these scetches and clips are collected from that show.
